description: Flagged 'Send Birgo AI Deep Learning Program pricing to Melvin Novak' as not sent. David confirmed the pricing email was sent. A follow-up to Melvin is still outstanding.
correction: Birgo pricing email to Melvin Novak is out. The open item is the follow-up call/meeting to scope the pilot — not the initial send.
systemic_fix: For post-call sales tasks, check Outlook Sent Items before declaring an action item incomplete in a briefing. Sent Items search takes 10 seconds and prevents false flags.
